turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: part of pretty good AI.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Am I speaking with Paul?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Uh, hey, actually no, this isn't Paul. I'm calling about getting an appointment.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Can you please provide the full name and date of birth of the patient you're calling about?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Sure, it’s Dana Whitfield, and my date of birth is February 28th, 1972.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks, Data.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: What is your date of birth?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: No problem.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Oh, yeah, it's February 28th, 1972.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: just to confirm.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I have your name as Dana Whitfield and your date of birth as February 28, 1972.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Is that correct?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: If so,

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Could you please spell your first and last name for me?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Sure, first name: D-A-N-A. Last name: W-H-I-T-F-I-E-L-D.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Go ahead and spell your first and last name please.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Right, it's D-A-N-A for the first name, and W-H-I-T-F-I-E-L-D for the last name.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thank you

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Can you please spell your last name Whitfield?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: No problem.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, sure. It's W-H-I-T-F-I-E-L-D.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to use a phone number to help look up your record?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, sure,

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: If so, please provide the number you have on file with us.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: If you're not sure, just let me know.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: I’ve got it. The number on file should be 651-903-2274.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I have your phone number as 651.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, that’s right.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: and your date of birth is fixed.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: February 28th, 1972. That’s correct.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I can't proceed further right now, but I can make sure our clinic support team follows up with you.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like me to connect you to our patient support team?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Actually, I’m looking to get an appointment for some pelvic pain after a fall. Could we set something up?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I'm unable to book the appointment directly right now due to a system issue.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: But I'll make sure our clinic support team follows up with you as soon as possible.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Please stay on the line while I document your request.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Alright, can you let me know how soon they might follow up? This pain’s pretty intense.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Connecting you to a representative.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Please wait.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Alright, I’ll hang on.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Hello.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: you've reached the pretty good AI test line.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Goodbye.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Wait, hold on—I’m still here. I really need to book that appointment.
